purpose: Record B/B+ acquisition candidates after PR-134 without promoting any records. This file is not a calendar input.

scope_rules.B: C fields plus first_race_time, time_zone, and time_source_url.
scope_rules.B+: B fields plus last_race_time. last_race_time is final race start time, not meeting_end_time.
scope_rules.promote_rule: Do not promote from C to B/B+ unless the first_race_time or last_race_time is source-verified through a reusable route.
scope_rules.monthly_display_rule: Monthly pages stay one row per meeting and do not expand A-rank race rows.

candidates.investigation_goal: Find a reusable official meeting or racecard route that exposes first_race_time, last_race_time, and preferably race_count for each June 2026 meeting.
candidates.do_not_promote_until: A reusable official route captures both first and last race start times without inference.
candidates.next_action: Inspect HKJC meeting/racecard pages for per-meeting race time payloads.

candidates.investigation_goal: Find official JRA racecard or meeting-day pages that expose first_race_time and last_race_time for June 2026 meetings.
candidates.do_not_promote_until: The extraction route is reusable by meeting date and racecourse and does not infer times from non-official summaries.
candidates.next_action: Inspect JRA racecard and meeting-day source paths for a stable time table.

candidates.investigation_goal: Find NAR race-by-day pages that expose first_race_time and last_race_time for each captured meeting.
candidates.do_not_promote_until: Race time source is official, date-specific, and can be regenerated monthly.
candidates.next_action: Inspect NAR race-by-day/racecard routes tied to MonthlyConveneInfo rows.

candidates.investigation_goal: Find HRI racecard or race-day detail pages with first_race_time and last_race_time per meeting.
candidates.do_not_promote_until: Times are captured from official HRI or linked official racecard sources with a reusable route.
candidates.next_action: Inspect HRI fixture detail and racecard pages for June 2026 race time fields.

candidates.investigation_goal: Find official BHA, Racing Admin, or racecard routes that expose first_race_time per meeting, then test whether last_race_time is also available.
candidates.do_not_promote_until: First race time is official and reusable by meeting. B+ requires final race start time, not meeting end time.
candidates.next_action: Inspect BHA fixture-linked racecard routes and avoid treating broad event end times as last_race_time.

candidates.investigation_goal: Verify whether Woodbine race pages expose reusable meeting-level first_race_time and last_race_time by date/month.
candidates.do_not_promote_until: Monthly regeneration can capture June 2026 meeting time rows without relying on only rolling upcoming windows.
candidates.next_action: Check whether Woodbine has date-addressable race pages or archives for June 2026.

candidates.investigation_goal: Find Racing NSW free fields or race diary routes that expose first and last race start times per meeting.
candidates.do_not_promote_until: Time fields are official, reusable, and tied to the same meeting_date/racecourse rows.
candidates.next_action: Inspect FreeFields meeting detail pages and any stable query parameters.

candidates.investigation_goal: Check whether Racing Queensland meeting detail pages expose first_race_time and last_race_time for June 2026.
candidates.do_not_promote_until: A reusable official meeting detail route is captured.
candidates.next_action: Inspect full calendar links and meeting detail payloads.

candidates.investigation_goal: Find LOVERACING/NZTR race-day pages that expose first and last race start times for captured June meetings.
candidates.do_not_promote_until: Time route is official, meeting-specific, and reusable beyond a rolling window.
candidates.next_action: Inspect LOVERACING/NZTR race-day and nominations/programme routes.

blocked_or_later.reason: C is still blocked; do not investigate B/B+ until source-verified racecourse rows are available.
C is still blocked; inspect FNCH/France Galop routes before B/B+.
C is still blocked; find full-month official row source before B/B+.
C is still blocked; find official full-month race-date source before B/B+.
C is still blocked; find official full-month race-date source before B/B+.
